things.name: Trinidad Carnival
things.description: World's greatest street party - soca music, elaborate mas bands and the Jouvert dawn parade

things.name: Asa Wright Nature Centre
things.description: World-famous birding centre in a tropical forest with 170+ species of birds

things.name: Queen's Park Savannah
things.description: World's largest city roundabout with the Magnificent Seven colonial mansions

things.name: Maracas Beach
things.description: Trinidad's finest beach with the legendary Richard's Bake and Shark

things.name: National Museum & Art Gallery
things.description: Trinidad's history from Amerindian times, the oil industry and carnival culture

things.name: Caroni Swamp Scarlet Ibis Tour
things.description: Evening boat tour to watch thousands of scarlet ibis flying to roost in the mangroves

things.name: Tobago Island Getaway
things.description: Tranquil sister island with the oldest protected forest reserve in the western hemisphere

things.name: Lopinot Historical Complex
things.description: Former cacao estate in the Northern Range with Amerindian heritage

things.name: Emperor Valley Zoo
things.description: Zoo set in the Botanical Gardens with the Green Anaconda and Trinidad Piping Guan

things.name: Doubles at Charlie's
things.description: Trinidad's iconic street food - curried chickpeas in fried bara bread, eaten at dawn
